summary: The user is organizing their travel history, starting with a trip to Chicago in February, where they stayed for four days and flew with United Airlines, receiving an upgrade to Economy Plus. They also discussed their upcoming bachelor party in Las Vegas in June and sought advice on staying healthy during that busy weekend.
facts: The user stayed in Chicago for 4 days in February.
The user flew with United Airlines on their Chicago trip and was upgraded to Economy Plus due to their loyalty program.
The user had a layover at Denver International Airport on the way back from Chicago and grabbed lunch at a BBQ joint they discovered last year.
The user is planning a trip to Las Vegas for a bachelor party in June.
The user is concerned about staying healthy during their Las Vegas trip, especially since it will be a busy weekend.
